overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a flying vehicle taking off from a fog-shrouded rooftop landing pad and ascending into dense white fog, followed by the arrival of a large Trauma Team aerial vehicle descending through the mist to land. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog, futuristic architecture, and dramatic lighting typical of sci-fi urban environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop landing pad in dense fog

events.description: flying vehicle initiates takeoff and begins ascending from the landing pad
camera tilts upward following the vehicle, increasing exposure to the bright fog above

agents.ego_description: stationary camera positioned on the rooftop observing the vehicle takeoff

notable_agents.action: small dark flying vehicle lifting off from the pad and ascending vertically

entered.detail: concrete rooftop landing pad with illuminated white markings and number 28
compact dark-colored flying car with circular design elements and blue lighting
metal safety railing at the edge of the high-rise building

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a fog-shrouded rooftop landing pad where a small dark flying vehicle sits centered on the concrete surface. As the vehicle's thrusters activate and it begins to ascend, the camera tilts upward to track its movement into the dense white fog, with the building's edge railing visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense fog cloud obscuring aerial space between buildings

events.description: ascending vehicle becomes a faint dark silhouette barely visible in the thick white fog
large Trauma Team vehicle emerges from above, descending through the fog layer

agents.ego_description: camera maintains upward angle tracking the ascending vehicle through the dense fog

notable_agents.action: original flying vehicle continuing ascent upward, becoming increasingly obscured by fog

entered.detail: large white armored aerial vehicle with red and blue markings descending from the fog

segments.scene_description: The view transitions to a near-whiteout as the camera tracks the small vehicle upward through dense fog. Visibility drops dramatically until only a dark silhouette remains. Suddenly, a much larger Trauma Team vehicle appears from above, its bulky white form descending through the mist as the original vehicle continues upward and fades from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop landing pad with medical emergency vehicle arrival

events.description: Trauma Team vehicle descends rapidly toward the landing pad with thrusters glowing blue
vehicle touches down on the landing pad, settling onto the concrete surface

agents.ego_description: camera watches from the landing pad as the large medical vehicle descends and lands

notable_agents.action: Trauma Team aerial vehicle descending with active thrusters and landing gear extended

entered.detail: concrete landing pad with illuminated markings becoming visible again as the vehicle approaches
pink and white hazard warning stripes on the pad edge becoming visible upon landing

segments.scene_description: The Trauma Team vehicle descends through the remaining fog layer, its white armored hull and medical cross insignia becoming clear as it approaches the landing pad. The camera captures the vehicle's final descent as its thrusters glow bright blue, settling onto the concrete surface where pink hazard stripes and the number 28 marking become visible on the pad.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a vehicle's ascent into a blinding whiteout before shifting to the descent of a larger craft onto a rooftop landing pad. It begins on a concrete surface where a small dark flying vehicle activates its thrusters and rises, prompting the camera to tilt upward and follow it into a dense layer of fog. As the vehicle climbs, the environment transitions into a near-whiteout where visibility drops dramatically, leaving only a dark silhouette before a bulky white Trauma Team vehicle suddenly emerges from above. The scene then opens as the larger craft descends through the thinning mist, its armored hull and medical insignia becoming clear. Finally, the camera tracks the vehicle's arrival as its blue thrusters glow, settling the craft onto the landing pad's pink hazard stripes and numerical markings.
